settings.title: No More Sticky Rollers
settings.body: Traditional tape rollers run out fast and create plastic waste. LintAway is fully reusable — just rinse and air dry.

settings.title: Anti-Static Glove
settings.body: The included glove neutralises static electricity that attracts pet hair to fabric, making removal effortless.

settings.title: Works Everywhere
settings.body: Sofas, car seats, curtains, clothing, bedding — the dual-direction brush lifts lint from any woven or knitted surface.

settings.title: Pet-Owner Approved
settings.body: Specifically designed for cat and dog hair, which is finer and clingier than lint. Works even on thick fur.

settings.title: Rinse Clean, Use Again
settings.body: Both the brush and glove clean in 10 seconds under running water. Fully dry in minutes. Ready to go again.

settings.title: Compact & Travel-Ready
settings.body: Lightweight enough to toss in a bag. Perfect for the office, car, or anywhere your pet's hair follows you.

settings.title: Slip on the Glove
settings.body: Wear the anti-static glove on one hand to neutralise cling before you even start brushing.

settings.title: Glide Over Fabric
settings.body: Run the gloved hand over the surface in long strokes. Hair and lint clump together immediately.

settings.title: Brush It Away
settings.body: Use the reusable lint brush to sweep up the clumped hair. Press and lift for full coverage.

settings.title: Rinse & Store
settings.body: Rinse both tools under water, shake dry, and store. Ready for the next round.

settings.hero_subtitle: Reusable lint brushes + anti-static glove — remove pet hair, lint, and dust from any fabric surface in seconds. No refills. No waste.
settings.purchase_subtitle: Reusable lint brush set with anti-static glove. Designed for everyday pet hair and lint removal on any fabric.
settings.purchase_shipping: Free shipping · Ships in 1–2 business days
